scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@dms/shared && npm run build --workspace=@dms/ui && npx tsc -b apps/api/tsconfig.json && npm run build --workspace=@dms/web && npm run build --workspace=@dms/desktop
scripts.package:windows: npm run build && npm run dist --workspace=@dms/desktop
